title: Stop Chasing Every Setup. Here's What Actually Made Me Profitable.
description: I used to overcomplicate everything in trading. Here's the simple mindset shift that changed everything for my ICT trading journey.
script: Stop chasing every setup. Seriously. I was overtrading everything. Taking 20 trades daily. Blowing accounts monthly. Analysis paralysis consumed me. Every signal looked perfect. Then I focused on quality. Three setups maximum per day. Patience became my edge. Now I'm consistently profitable. Less trades, more profits. Follow R2F Trading for more.
copyText:
Stop Chasing Every Setup. Here's What Actually Made Me Profitable.

I used to overcomplicate everything in trading. Here's the simple mindset shift that changed everything for my ICT trading journey.
